properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 137/18
SVALBARD
1. TWO SCIENTIFIC ROCKETS WILL BE LAUNCHED FROM ANDOEYA SPACE CENTERS FACILITY AT NY-AALESUND ON SVALBARD IN THE PERIOD FROM 04 TO 19 DEC  2018. THE LAUNCH WILL BE CONDUCTED BETWEEN 0700-1200 UTC, IN THE ANNOUNCED PERIOD.
MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING HAZARD AREAS:
AREA 1: CIRCLE WITH CENTER IN POSITION 77-25.0N. 009-00.0E. WITH A RADIUS OF 30 NM. 
AREA 2: CIRCLE WITH CENTER IN POSITION 73-00.0N. 003-00.0E. WITH A RADIUS OF 120 NM


 PREVIOUS HF WARNINGS ISSUED NAVAREA XIX 73/18
